name: myoperator-plugins
description: myOperator design system plugins for AI-assisted UI development

plugins.name: myoperator-design
plugins.description: Generate UIs matching the myOperator design system aesthetic. Creates standalone React/Tailwind code with the design system's color tokens, typography, and component patterns.

plugins.name: myoperator-workflows
plugins.description: Developer workflow plugin for myOperator teams: /create-component and /publish-all with production gates and release branching.
